title: Iran agrees in principle to dispose of highly-enriched uranium, White House official says
snippet: CBS News reports that Iran's supreme leader has approved a 'template' for disposing of highly-enriched uranium in a two-step process, marking a key concession in the ongoing peace deal negotiations.
tag_reason: 신규 — 이란 최고지도자가 고농축 우라늄 처분 '템플릿'을 승인했다는 백악관 관리 발언이 처음 보도된 핵심 진전 소식
